prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-TTAHW6CRC-7PC-MED-BL-3 Product Type: NON_RIDING_TOY_VEHICLE Brand (from catalog): Kid Fun Existing Title: 7pc Go Truckin Semi Truck Toy Diecast Race Car Carrier Set Description: Loading, unloading and hauling the 6 classic die-cast race cars within this transport truck gets imaginations moving. Playing with toy trucks and race cars as a kid is a must. No childhood is complete without a collection of toy vehicles.

The Auto Hauler 6 Car Truck Carrier is brightly detailed with super speed racing flames on the side of the cab. From the side you can see all the awesome fiery of the race cars that are contained in each of their respectable slots. Additionally, the semi truck's car carrier comes with a hidden handle, so kids will be able to cart around their favorite cars to and from play dates. The carry case opens to reveal individual spaces for each race car.

Every kid needs their share of toy cars and trucks. The multiple colors of race cars and sleek appearance of the truck and carrier will provide children with hours of pretend racing and driving fun.

Easy and simple to travel with & to take along with you wherever you may go.

Truck comes in blue or red. Ships at random unless otherwise requested. Search Terms: toy cars car play set on the go toys semi truck toy gifts for boys Features: - Fun Race-themed Design - Transporter Truck with Diecast Colored Race Cars - (6) Diecast Race Cars in Assorted Colors that load and Unload - Hidden Top Handle for Easy Transportation - Hot Flames Decal on Truck === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
